001package applicationMain;
002
003import entityClasses.Post;
004import entityClasses.PostList;
005import entityClasses.Reply;
006import entityClasses.ReplyList;
007import org.junit.jupiter.api.BeforeEach;
008import org.junit.jupiter.api.Test;
009
010import java.util.List;
011
012import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertEquals;
013import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertFalse;
014import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertThrows;
015import static org.junit.jupiter.api.Assertions.assertTrue;
016
017class GradingServiceTest {
018
019        private PostList postList;
020        private ReplyList replyList;
021        private GradingService gradingService;
022
023        @BeforeEach
024        void setUp() {
025                postList = new PostList();
026                replyList = new ReplyList();
027                gradingService = new GradingService(postList, replyList, Role.INSTRUCTOR);
028
029                postList.createPost(new Post(100, "Q1", "Question", "CSE360", "studB", false));
030                postList.createPost(new Post(101, "Q2", "Question", "CSE360", "studC", false));
031                postList.createPost(new Post(102, "Q3", "Question", "CSE360", "studD", false));
032                postList.createPost(new Post(103, "Q4", "Question", "CSE360", "studE", false));
033        }
034
035        @Test
036        void boundary_zeroUniqueStudents_returnsFalse() throws Exception {
037                assertEquals(0, gradingService.countUniqueStudentsAnswered("studA"));
038                assertFalse(gradingService.checkGradingEligibility("studA"));
039        }
040
041        @Test
042        void boundary_oneUniqueStudent_returnsFalse() throws Exception {
043                gradingService.addReply(50, 100, "Answer B", "studA");
044
045                assertEquals(1, gradingService.countUniqueStudentsAnswered("studA"));
046                assertFalse(gradingService.checkGradingEligibility("studA"));
047        }
048
049        @Test
050        void belowBoundary_twoUniqueStudents_returnsFalse() throws Exception {
051                gradingService.addReply(1, 100, "Answer B", "studA");
052                gradingService.addReply(2, 101, "Answer C", "studA");
053
054                assertEquals(2, gradingService.countUniqueStudentsAnswered("studA"));
055                assertFalse(gradingService.checkGradingEligibility("studA"));
056        }
057
058        @Test
059        void onBoundary_threeUniqueStudents_returnsTrue() throws Exception {
060                gradingService.addReply(3, 100, "Answer B", "studA");
061                gradingService.addReply(4, 101, "Answer C", "studA");
062                gradingService.addReply(5, 102, "Answer D", "studA");
063
064                assertEquals(3, gradingService.countUniqueStudentsAnswered("studA"));
065                assertTrue(gradingService.checkGradingEligibility("studA"));
066        }
067
068        @Test
069        void aboveBoundary_tenUniqueStudents_returnsTrue() throws Exception {
070                for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
071                        int postId = 200 + i;
072                        postList.createPost(new Post(postId, "Q" + i, "Question " + i, "CSE360", "peer" + i, false));
073                        gradingService.addReply(1000 + i, postId, "Answer " + i, "studA");
074                }
075
076                assertEquals(10, gradingService.countUniqueStudentsAnswered("studA"));
077                assertTrue(gradingService.checkGradingEligibility("studA"));
078        }
079
080        @Test
081        void duplicateEdge_multipleRepliesToSameAuthor_countsOnce() throws Exception {
082                gradingService.addReply(6, 100, "Answer 1", "studA");
083                gradingService.addReply(7, 100, "Answer 2", "studA");
084                gradingService.addReply(8, 100, "Answer 3", "studA");
085
086                assertEquals(1, gradingService.countUniqueStudentsAnswered("studA"));
087                assertFalse(gradingService.checkGradingEligibility("studA"));
088        }
089
090        @Test
091        void xssInjection_inputIsSanitizedBeforeSaving() {
092                Reply saved = gradingService.addReply(9, 100, "<script>alert('hacked')</script>", "studA");
093                assertEquals("&lt;script&gt;alert(&#39;hacked&#39;)&lt;/script&gt;", saved.getBody());
094        }
095
096        @Test
097        void nullOrEmptyInput_throwsIllegalArgumentException() {
098                assertThrows(IllegalArgumentException.class, () -> gradingService.addReply(10, 100, "   ", "studA"));
099                assertThrows(IllegalArgumentException.class, () -> gradingService.addReply(11, 100, "Body", null));
100        }
101
102        @Test
103        void unauthorizedAccess_studentRoleThrowsAccessDenied() {
104                gradingService.setCurrentRole(Role.STUDENT);
105                assertThrows(AccessDeniedException.class, () -> gradingService.showAllStats());
106        }
107
108        @Test
109        void coveragePaths_zeroReplies_and_reviewSelection() throws Exception {
110                assertEquals(0, gradingService.countUniqueStudentsAnswered("noRepliesStudent"));
111
112                gradingService.addReply(12, 100, "Answer B", "studA");
113                gradingService.addReply(13, 101, "Answer C", "studA");
114                gradingService.addReply(14, 103, "Answer E", "studZ");
115
116                List<Reply> review = gradingService.getAnswersForReview("studA");
117                assertEquals(2, review.size());
118        }
119
120        /**
121         * Positive prototype test used for documentation screenshots.
122         * A student with three unique recipients should be grading-eligible.
123         */
124        @Test
125        void testEligibleStudent() throws Exception {
126                gradingService.addReply(2001, 100, "Answer to B", "studX");
127                gradingService.addReply(2002, 101, "Answer to C", "studX");
128                gradingService.addReply(2003, 102, "Answer to D", "studX");
129
130                assertTrue(gradingService.checkGradingEligibility("studX"));
131                assertEquals(3, gradingService.countUniqueStudentsAnswered("studX"));
132        }
133
134        /**
135         * Negative/boundary prototype test used for documentation screenshots.
136         * Repeated replies to one recipient must not count as multiple unique recipients.
137         */
138        @Test
139        void testIneligibleStudent() throws Exception {
140                gradingService.addReply(3001, 100, "First reply", "studY");
141                gradingService.addReply(3002, 100, "Second reply same recipient", "studY");
142                gradingService.addReply(3003, 100, "Third reply same recipient", "studY");
143
144                assertFalse(gradingService.checkGradingEligibility("studY"));
145                assertEquals(1, gradingService.countUniqueStudentsAnswered("studY"));
146        }
147}
